g.text: FABIO value-added per item for Guatemala (GTM); items below 3% max |share| of WB across years are grouped as
"Other". Primary (ISIC-A) row: black line = WB ag VA, grey dashed = FABIO-comparable WB (WB minus seeds and
forestry), points coloured by forestry source (see legend). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs processing (ISIC-C).
FABIO value-added [COMBINED_GLORIA] vs World Bank agricultural value-added — Guatemala (GTM)
